summary: Iteration 8 testing complete. All Standings Column Configuration features working correctly. 9/9 backend tests passed, 7/7 frontend UI tests passed. Admin can toggle which columns appear in the public standings table via the 'Στήλες' button in the Standings tab. Settings persist in MongoDB.
critical_code_review_comments: StandingsColumnConfig model in server.py correctly defines all 9 column toggles with proper defaults
GET /api/settings/standings-columns returns default config when no document exists in MongoDB
PUT /api/admin/settings/standings-columns correctly requires authentication (returns 401 without auth)
Admin modal in StandingsTab shows all 9 checkboxes with Greek labels
Points column has 'Συνιστάται' (Recommended) label for UX guidance
Public homepage standings table correctly conditionally renders columns based on config
Settings stored in MongoDB collection 'site_settings' with key 'standings_columns'
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified: 1) GET /api/settings/standings-columns returns default config (played/won/drawn/lost/goal_difference/points=true, goals_for/goals_against/form=false), 2) PUT /api/admin/settings/standings-columns requires auth (401 without), 3) Admin Panel Standings tab has 'Στήλες' button (data-testid='column-config-btn'), 4) Column config modal shows 9 toggle checkboxes with Greek labels (Αγώνες, Νίκες, Ισοπαλίες, Ήττες, Γκολ Υπέρ, Γκολ Κατά, Διαφορά Γκολ, Βαθμοί, Φόρμα), 5) Toggling goals_for ON shows ΓΥ column on public homepage, 6) Toggling goals_for OFF hides ΓΥ column, 7) Settings persist in MongoDB (reload shows same config), 8) Public homepage standings table headers are in Greek (Θ, Ομάδα, Αγ, Ν, Ι, Η, ΔΓ, Βαθ)

GET /api/settings/standings-columns.details: Returns default config with correct boolean values

PUT /api/admin/settings/standings-column.details: Updates config and returns updated values

Settings persistence.details: Settings persist in MongoDB after save

column_config_modal.details: Modal shows 9 toggle checkboxes with Greek labels

save_functionality.details: Save button persists changes to MongoDB

standings_table_headers.details: Headers in Greek: Θ, Ομάδα, Αγ, Ν, Ι, Η, ΔΓ, Βαθ

column_visibility_after_toggle.details: ΓΥ column appears after toggling on in admin

column_hidden_after_toggle_off.details: ΓΥ column hidden after toggling off in admin
